name: Hair Salon
title: AI Tools for Hair Salons | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for hair salons — fill the books, cut no-shows, and keep clients rebooking. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month. No contracts.
hero_lede: Open chairs, no-shows, and clients who drift away quietly drain a salon's revenue. We build the tools that keep the books full, the reminders going out, and the regulars coming back.
drains: Booking requests coming in while stylists are with clients
No-shows and late cancellations leaving gaps in the day
Clients who don't rebook and slowly drift away
The front desk juggling phones, check-in, and product all at once

tools.title: Booking assistant
tools.body: Every call, text, and DM gets an instant reply, the service matched to the right stylist, and a slot booked — so a busy front desk never costs you a client.

tools.title: No-show reducer
tools.body: Well-timed confirmations and reminders go out before every appointment, and cancellations get offered to your waitlist to fill the gap.

tools.title: Rebooking assistant
tools.body: It reaches out to clients who haven't rebooked, in your salon's voice, so regulars don't quietly drift to another chair.

tools.title: Daily front-desk brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's appointments by stylist, open slots to fill, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A hair salon with a busy, stretched front desk.
cases.before: Booking messages waited; some clients gave up and booked elsewhere.
cases.after: Every call, text, and DM answered instantly and booked with the right stylist.
cases.impact: Representative result: a fuller book with no extra front-desk strain.

cases.context: A salon losing clients who never rebooked.
cases.before: Clients drifted away with no one reaching out.
cases.after: Lapsed clients nudged automatically in the salon's voice.
cases.impact: Representative result: more regulars retained and a steadier book.

faq.q: Can it match a service to the right stylist?
faq.a: Yes. We train it on your stylists, their specialties, and their availability, so it books color with a colorist and a cut with the right chair.

faq.q: Will it sound like our salon?
faq.a: Yes. Every message is written in your salon's voice. Many owners review the first batch to fine-tune the tone, then let it run.

faq.q: Will it work with my booking software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of Vagaro, Boulevard, Square, or whatever you already use.
